raw.subject: Your Jefferson City page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

 I've been following your Facebook posts, and I love how you always share pictures of Jaylynn and Arianna working hard behind the scenes at Food Truck Takeover! It's clear that's a family effort, and I appreciate the personal touch.

 But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and I think that might be leaving potential customers hanging - especially when they're searching for food trucks in Jefferson City. It's a missed opportunity to share your menu, hours, and contact info all in one place.

 I took a closer look at your Facebook photos and posts, and I sketched out a simple homepage idea that might help you showcase your business. It's got a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions.

 https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/cajun-catfish-house-food-truck-jefferson-city

 No obligation, just a thought - building a simple website like this can be a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. If you'd like to discuss further, I'd be happy to reply or schedule a quick call to chat more about it.
